AUTH.USER_ACCOUNT_NOT_ADMIN: User account is not an admin

USER.PASSWORD_NOT_SECURE: Password is not secure enough (at least 10 characters)
USER.DEACTIVATED_USER_CANNOT_BE_SUSPENDED: A deactivated user cannot be suspended
USER.ADMIN_CONNOT_BE_MODIFIED: The admin role cannot be changed

AREA.ADD_NEW_MOVIE: Add a new movie to the platform
AREA.ADD_MOVIE_TO_SELECTION: Add a movie to a selection
AREA.ADD_NEW_SERIES: Add a new series to the platform
AREA.ADD_SERIES_TO_SELECTION: Add a series to a selection
AREA.EDIT_MOVIE: Edit a movie (title, category, background, logo, poster)
AREA.EDIT_SERIES: Edit a series (title, category, background, poster)

SUPPORT.DESCRIPTION_CANNOT_EMPTY_INSUFFICIENT: The description must not be empty or is insufficient
SUPPORT.REQUIERED_FIELD: The concerned area has not been specified

VERIFICATION_CODE.SUBJECT: Email verification
VERIFICATION_CODE.INSTRUCTION: Enter this code to confirm your email address:
VERIFICATION_CODE.VALIDITY: This code is valid for 5 minutes and can only be used once.
VERIFICATION_CODE.EMAIL_CONFIRM: By entering this code, you will also confirm the email address associated with your account.
VERIFICATION_CODE.IGNORE: If you did not attempt to sign in, you can simply ignore this email.

PASSWORD.SUBJECT: New password
PASSWORD.WELCOME: Welcome {pseudo}!!! Your account has been activated.
PASSWORD.NEW_PASSWORD: You will find your new password below:
PASSWORD.CHANGE_PASSWORD: After your first login with this password, we invite you to go to your account settings, under the "Manage Profile" section, to change it.

SUSPENDED.SUBJECT: Account suspended
SUSPENDED.REASON: Your account has been suspended for purely personal reasons.
SUSPENDED.COMPLAINT: You are of course welcome to send a complaint that we won't read 🧻.
SUSPENDED.BACK_TO_PAID: But in the meantime, why not go back to your paid subscriptions? Netflix, Amazon, Disney+ — why not return to your life of obediently paying others to do the work for you?
SUSPENDED.PAY_TO_SUFFER: Missing paying to get treated like dirt, are we 💩?
SUSPENDED.NO_TEARS: If you thought we'd cry for you… nope 😎.
SUSPENDED.GO_BACK: Go back to your shows, your games, or your sites full of flashing ads and unpredictable pop-ups with your questionable tastes.
SUSPENDED.ADVICE: But ☝️, a friendly tip: use this as a chance to take a break ☕. The world won't end because your account is suspended, even if getting banned like this is a little embarrassing 🤭.
